pattern: Because the array is strictly increasing, each value can ask a set whether its two diff-spaced partners exist, turning the triple search into membership checks.
hints: Fix the middle (or any) anchor value and look for the two partners offset by diff.
Put all values in a set so checking whether v - diff and v + diff are present is constant time.
Count a triplet whenever a value v has both v - diff and v + diff in the set; sum those over all values.

edge_inputs.description: minimum length with exactly one triplet
no triplet because spacing never matches
overlapping triplets share a middle element

stress.description: dense strictly increasing array with a small diff to create many triplets
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    diff = rng.randint(1, 50)
    cap = 200
    n = max(3, min(size, cap + 1))
    vals = sorted(rng.sample(range(0, cap + 1), min(n, cap + 1)))
    return [vals, diff]
